stories.title: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm
stories.summary: Artificial intelligence chip startup Tenstorrent Inc. is drawing early takeover interest from prospective buyers at a moment of renewed momentum for upstarts looking to challenge Nvidia Corp. and Advanced Micro Devices Inc.

stories.title: Trump pivots to midterms, affordability after China summit as Iran war persists

stories.title: Trump says he's postponing 'scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow' at Middle East leaders' request
stories.summary: The U.S. and Iran are in a stalemate centered on the Strait of Hormuz, the global oil pathway whose closure due to the war has caused an energy supply shock.

stories.title: Dell Scales Up the AI Supply Chain to Meet Demand
stories.summary: Dell Technologies Inc. Chief Executive Officer Michael Dell and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang talk about how they work together on Dell's AI Factory which uses servers with Nvidia chips, software and services. They speak to Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow at the Dell World conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Oil price slumps as Trump says he called off Iran attacks
stories.summary: Energy markets have been on a wild ride as the key Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively closed.

stories.title: 'People Are Concerned' Over The Data Center Boom In Georgia Says Leavell
stories.summary: Chuck Leavell, Rock and roll superstar, member of Allman Brothers, and The Rolling Stones joined Joe Mathieu on Balance of Power to discuss Georgia's upcoming primaries. They also discussed AI and the future of the music industry as well as what issues the people of Georgia are concerned about including the rise in data centers. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Inside Meta’s $200 Billion Louisiana Data Center Bet
stories.summary: Meta is building one of the largest artificial intelligence data centers in the world, and it's going up in a remote corner of Louisiana. Financed by one of the biggest private capital deals ever assembled, the project in rural Richland Parish will require up to 7.5 gigawatts of power, 5 gigawatts for computing alone, from 10 brand new natural gas plants. In a region desperate for economic revival

stories.title: IREN CEO: Have Great Relationship With Dell and Nvidia
stories.summary: IREN, a vertically integrated AI cloud provider, recently announced a strategic partnership with Nvidia for up to $2.1 billion as part of a broader agreement between the two companies aimed at accelerating the construction of AI infrastructure. IREN CEO Daniel Roberts joins Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of Dell Technologies World in Las Vegas to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Nvidia's Huang Sees China Becoming a More Open Market
stories.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang talks about the trip he took to China with President Donald Trump and other American business leaders. Huang says he didn't talk to the Chinese directly about selling them H200 chips. Huang and Michael Dell speak to Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow at the Dell World conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Nvidia Earnings This Week; Biggest Power Deal in History | Bloomberg Tech 5/18/2026
stories.summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses what to expect from Nvidia this week as investors anxiously await the company's earnings results. Plus, the AI data center boom triggers the largest power deal in history, the filing for SpaceX's IPO could come as soon as this week, and Ed Ludlow brings the latest from Dell Technologies World in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Nvidia's Huang, Michael Dell on Agentic AI, Memory Demand and China
stories.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and Dell CEO Michael Dell discuss agentic AI, the demand for memory and the outlook for the China market with Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of the Dell World event in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: China Will Open Its Market to AI Chips From US, Nvidia’s CEO Says
stories.summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang, speaking days after he joined President Donald Trump’s summit in China, said he expects Chinese authorities will eventually allow the import of artificial intelligence chips from the US.

stories.title: SpaceX IPO Could Value Company at $2 Trillion

stories.title: The Fed will have to raise interest rates in July to appease 'bond vigilantes,' Yardeni says
stories.summary: Sent to the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, incoming Chair Kevin Warsh instead may have to push for higher levels.

stories.title: SEC to Ready Plan for Trading Crypto Versions of Stocks
stories.summary: The Trump administration is poised to roll out a plan for trading digital versions of securities that could reshape the landscape of the American stock market as it continues to loosen the rules for free-wheeling crypto markets.

stories.title: Live in Atlanta for Georgia Primary | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/18/2026
stories.summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses Tuesday's primary elections. On today's show, Joe is live from Georgia Tech in Atlanta. He speaks with Georgia Tech President Angel Cabrera, former Atlanta Mayor Shirley Johnson and Grammy Award Winning Rapper Michael "Killer Mike" Render. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Apple's ChatGPT-Like App Includes New Privacy Features
stories.summary: Apple is set to debut iOS 27 at this year's WWDC, featuring a revamped Siri experience. The update is expected to introduce new privacy-focused features that could help differentiate Siri in the crowded chatbot market. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman joins Caroline Hyde with the details on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Believer in International Diversification: Kellert
stories.summary: Kathy Kellert, head of index equity product at Vanguard, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the recently launched Vanguard Developed Markets ex-US Value Index ETF (ticker: VDV) and Vanguard Developed Markets ex-US Growth Index ETF (ticker: VDG). (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Some Buyer Fatigue in Credit: Matt Brill

stories.title: Global Bond Sell Off Hits Markets, JPMorgan's Tokenized Fund Filing | ETF IQ 5/18/2026
stories.summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Invesco head of North America Investment Grade Credit Matt Brill, SS&C Alps Advisors Head of Fund Sales and Strategy Paul Baiocchi, and Vanguard Head of Index Equity Product Kathy Kellert. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: US to Issue New Russia Oil Waiver as Iran War Hits Supplies
stories.summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on Monday said his department is issuing a “temporary 30-day general license” allowing the sale of Russian crude oil and petroleum products that are already loaded on tankers. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Apple Readies AI Writing Help, App Shortcuts and Wallpapers for iOS 27
stories.summary: Apple Inc. is preparing a wave of artificial intelligence features for its next iPhone and iPad operating systems, including a grammar checker and new shortcut options, part of an effort to narrow the gap with capabilities available on rival devices.

stories.title: NextEra Energy to buy Dominion in deal that unites two key players in race to power AI data centers

stories.title: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67 Billion to Form Power Giant
stories.summary: NextEra Energy Inc. agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy Inc. in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia.

stories.title: China's economy loses steam in April as retail sales hit 40-month low

stories.title: Japan Official Sows Doubt Over Potential US Treasuries Sales
stories.summary: A senior Japanese Finance Ministry official sowed doubt over any prospects for the nation to sell US Treasuries as part of any move to prop up the yen, suggesting the maneuver could end up being counterproductive.

stories.title: Fast-Moving Sandy Fire Out of Control Near Los Angeles
stories.summary: A brush fire in Southern California's Simi Valley has prompted evacuations as high winds fuel the blaze. The Sandy Fire broke out Monday morning about 20 miles northwest of Los Angeles. It has consumed about 184 acres and remains out of control according to state fire officials. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Musk loses OpenAI court battle after jury finds he waited too long to sue

stories.title: AI 'Industrial Revolution' Taking Place, Says Boston Children's Chief Medical Officer
stories.summary: Dr. Joan LaRovere, chief medical officer at Boston Children’s Hospital, said that AI can 'bolster' the capabilities of health care providers to help diagnose and treat patients more effectively. Dr. LaRovere said that she believes the moment in time is like the 'industrial revolution' that can revolutionize health care. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Where the US-China Trade Relationship Stands Now

stories.title: Foreign Holdings of Treasuries Fell in March Amid Bill Sales
